steps.t: Thorlind can be found on the path south of Felegoth. You should talk to Thorlind.
Follow the path west and search for some sign of the Beornings. You should search for the Beornings' trail.
The Beornings headed west, towards The Forest Gate. You should follow the Beornings' trail.
The Beornings headed west, towards The Forest Gate. You should search for Beorning prints.
The Beornings suddenly ran into the woods, north of the path. You should search for a clue to discover their whereabouts.
You have found the scene of a struggle north of the path. You should investigate the scene.
